notes.hypothesis: After 48h without additional water, the previously wet plant should have moved from saturated/wet toward a drier band, but may still show uneven moisture by probe position.
notes.method: Four wiped probes were inserted to consistent depth around P01 and allowed to settle for about 2 min, then captured for 180 s at 1 s cadence before any watering. Source was serial device.
notes.findings: Medians: s1 2110, s2 2164, s3 2189, s4 2098 raw ADC. Higher raw ADC means drier. All four channels were near the provisional drying/dry region, with about 91 counts between wettest and driest medians. Ranges were tight: s1 2106-2115, s2 2156-2172, s3 2184-2195, s4 2090-2107. All channels drifted slightly downward during capture, consistent with possible continued probe/soil contact settling after insertion.
notes.conclusion: P01 was substantially dried out relative to the earlier wet run and was ready for watering. This capture is a useful dry baseline for the following rewatering run. Exact band labels remain provisional until per-channel calibration is ratified.
